name: Chicken Almond Guy Din
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and dice all ingredients. Toast almonds in the oven.
2. Heat oil in a wok until smoking point, add chicken and onions to it. Stir fry for 3 minutes.
3. Add celery to the remaining ingredients, except for the toasted almonds and corn starch solution.
4. Stir everything well. Cover the wok and cook the ingredients for 2 minutes.
5. Lift the cover about two times during cooking to stir the ingredients.
6. At the end of the cooking time, uncover the wok, add the thoroughly mixed corn starch solution, and cook until gravy forms.
7. Place the ingredients in a serving platter. Sprinkle with toasted almonds.
NOTE: Chicken may be replaced by shrimps or pork in the above recipe.
